sources.title: Through Terror to Triumph
sources.citation: Lloyd George, David. Through Terror to Triumph: Speeches and Pronouncements of the Right Hon. David Lloyd George, M.P., Since the Beginning of the War. 1915. Internet Archive.
sources.rights_rationale: The 1915 volume is a pre-1929 edition. The selected source text is Internet Archive OCR from a public-domain scan.
sources.acquisition_instructions: Run scripts/extract-wwi-britain-speeches.py to download Internet Archive OCR and extract only the selected Lloyd George speech. Preserve generated provenance headers. OCR review remains required before publication-grade claims.
sources.translation_risk_notes: English source text; no translation layer. OCR noise and edition verification remain source-quality risks.
sources.notes: Approved by the pre-v1 expansion rights/provenance review for issue #179 as part of the British WWI draft source base.
